mapper.select:
/* goodlifeMapper.getGoodLifeSmsSendList */
SELECT 'NAC' AS EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.SUB_LINK_NAME , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , E.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , E.MINOR_AGENT_TEL /* 오전 9시 이전 이벤트 발생시 오전 10시 일괄 발송 오전 9시 00분 ~ 오후 8시 59분부터 문자 즉시 발송 이후 발생시 익일 10시 일괄 발송 */ , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D , MSP_REQUEST_DTL E WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.REG_DTTM >= (SYSDATE - 10/24/60) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE) AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PARTNER_ID = 'goodlife' AND C.POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SVC_CNTR_NO = A.SVC_CNTR_NO) UNION ALL /* 요금제변경(타 요금제 -> 제휴요금제) */ SELECT 'SCH_IN' AS EVNT_CD , B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SUB_LINK_NAME , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , E.MINOR_AGENT_NAME , E.MINOR_AGENT_TEL /* 중복된 문자를 발송하지 않기 위하여 체크 */ , CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) THEN CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END ELSE 'X' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D , MSP_REQUEST_DTL E WHERE A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND A.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND A.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = A.SERVICE_TYPE) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.SOC = C.RATE_CD AND C.PARTNER_ID = 'goodlife' AND C.POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND D.CUSTOMER_TYPE = 'I' AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = E.CONTRACT_NUM /* 해지를 위하여 정지복구하는 경우가 있음 ( 정지 -> 정지복구 -> 해지 ) */ AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ('SUS','RSP','CAN','RCL','MCN') AND EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) UNION ALL /* 요금제변경 ( 제휴요금제 -> 타 요금제 ) */ /* 문자 전송을 위하여 기존 요금제명을 조회한다. */ SELECT 'SCH_OUT' AS EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , C.SUBSCRIBER_NO , C.CUSTOMER_ID , C.SUB_LINK_NAME , A.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , '' AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , '' AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C WHERE A.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.EVNT_TRTM_DT >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND B.APP_END_DATE = (SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = B.SERVICE_TYPE) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO AND C.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_PARTNER_RATE_MST WHERE PARTNER_ID = 'goodlife' AND POINT_TYPE = 'PT03' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND RATE_CD = B.SOC) UNION ALL /* 정지/정지복구/해지/해지복구/명의변경 */ SELECT A.EVNT_CD , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , B.CUSTOMER_ID , B.SUB_LINK_NAME , C.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(C.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , '' AS MINOR_AGENT_NAME , '' AS MINOR_AGENT_TEL , CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) THEN CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') < '09' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24') BETWEEN '09' AND '20' THEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ELSE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000' END ELSE 'X' END REQ_SEND_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST C WHERE A.EVNT_CD IN ('SUS','RSP','CAN','RCL','MCN') AND A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 10/24/60, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.EVNT_CHANGE_DATE = (SELECT MAX(EVNT_CHANGE_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.END_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(END_DTTM) FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM)
mapper.update:
/* goodlifeMapper.updateAddSvcYn */
MERGE INTO MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A USING ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , A.END_DTTM , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS ADD_SVC_YN , NVL(MIN(SUBSTR(B.EFFECTIVE_DATE, 1, 8)) OVER(PARTITION BY B.EFFECTIVE_DATE), '') AS ADD_SVC_DT FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B WHERE A.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.PARTNER_YN = 'Y' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.SOC(+) = 'KISPRDLDC' AND B.SERVICE_TYPE(+) = 'R' AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE(+) > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) B ON (A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.END_DTTM = B.END_DTTM) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ADD_SVC_YN = B.ADD_SVC_YN , A.ADD_SVC_DT = B.ADD_SVC_DT
mapper.select: /* goodLifeMapper.getGoodLifeMemberList */ SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , C.SUBSCRIBER_NO , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , SUBSTR(A.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8) AS STRT_DTTM , A.MINOR_AGENT_NM , A.MINOR_AGENT_TEL , NVL(D.ORGN_NM, C.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_NM , C.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(C.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DT , DECODE(MOD(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(C.USER_SSN), 7, 1), 2), 0, '여', '남') AS GENDER FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST D WHERE A.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = B.CUSTOMER_ID AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.OPEN_AGNT_CD = D.ORGN_ID(+)

SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.ADD_SVC_YN, 'N') AS ADD_SVC_YN , A.ADD_SVC_DT , NVL(A.PAY_CNT, 0) AS PAY_CNT , NVL(A.PARTNER_PYMN_YN, 'N') AS PARTNER_PYMN_YN , NVL(B.USG_YM, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM')) AS USG_YM , NVL(B.BILL_YM, TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM')) AS BILL_YM , NVL(B.STTL_YM, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')) AS STTL_YM , NVL(B.DC_CNT, 0) AS DC_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.PYMN_CD IN ('INV', 'ADJR') THEN C.PYMN_AMNT + C.VAT_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS BASE_AMT , SUM(CASE WHEN C.PYMN_CD = 'ADJ' AND C.ADJS_RSN_CD = 'PRDLIF' THEN C.PYMN_AMNT + C.VAT_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS DC_AMT FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_GOODLIFE_POINT_MST B , CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA C WHERE A.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(B.USG_YM, 'YYYYMM')), 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND B.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM(+) AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND C.BILL_RFLC_IND_CD(+) = 'B' AND C.BILL_ITEM_CD(+) = 'MAVOI' AND C.PYMN_CD(+) IN ('INV', 'ADJ', 'ADJR') AND B.USG_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') GROUP BY A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.ADD_SVC_YN, 'N') , A.ADD_SVC_DT , NVL(A.PAY_CNT, 0) , NVL(A.PARTNER_PYMN_YN, 'N') , B.USG_YM , B.BILL_YM , B.STTL_YM , NVL(B.DC_CNT, 0)

SELECT A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.ADD_SVC_YN, 'N') AS ADD_SVC_YN , A.ADD_SVC_DT , NVL(A.PAY_CNT, 0) AS PAY_CNT , NVL(A.PARTNER_PYMN_YN, 'N') AS PARTNER_PYMN_YN , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AS USG_YM , B.BILL_YM , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AS STTL_YM , NVL(D.DC_CNT, 0) AS DC_CNT , C.PYMN_AMNT + C.VAT_AMNT AS BASE_AMT , B.PYMN_AMNT + B.VAT_AMNT AS DC_AMT FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA B , CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA C , MSP_GOODLIFE_POINT_MST D WHERE A.END_DTTM >= TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.BILL_ITEM_CD = 'MAVOI' AND B.PYMN_CD = 'ADJ' AND B.ADJS_RSN_CD = 'PRDLIF' AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = C.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.BILL_YM = C.BILL_YM AND B.BILL_ITEM_CD = C.BILL_ITEM_CD AND C.PYMN_CD = 'INV' AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = D.SVC_CNTR_NO(+) AND B.BILL_YM = D.BILL_YM(+)

/* goodlifeMapper.getCheckAddSvcList */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , NVL(A.DC_CNT, 0) AS DC_CNT , NVL(MIN(SUBSTR(C.EFFECTIVE_DATE,1,6)) OVER(PARTITION BY A.SVC_CNTR_NO), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM')) AS STRT_YM FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_MEMBER_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO C WHERE A.END_DTTM > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND A.PARTNER_YN = 'Y' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND C.SERVICE_TYPE(+) = 'R' AND C.SOC(+) = 'KISPRDLDC' AND C.EXPIRATION_DATE(+) > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM MSP_GOODLIFE_POINT_MST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = A.SVC_CNTR_NO)
mapper.insert: /* goodlifeMapper.insertAllCnt */ INSERT INTO MSP_GOODLIFE_POINT_MST ( SVC_CNTR_NO , USG_YM , BILL_YM , STTL_YM , DC_CNT , REGST_DTTM ) SELECT #{svcCntrNo} , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{strtYm}, 'YYYYMM'), LEVEL-1), 'YYYYMM') AS USG_YM /* 사용월 */ , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{strtYm}, 'YYYYMM'), LEVEL), 'YYYYMM') AS BILL_YM /* 청구월 */ , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{strtYm}, 'YYYYMM'), LEVEL+1), 'YYYYMM') AS STTL_YM /* 정산월 */ , LEVEL + #{dcCnt} AS DC_CNT , SYSDATE FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 36 - #{dcCnt}
